A small [[Starship/Legends|starship]] with a wide mission profile, the '''''Warden''-class light cruiser''' was produced by [[Sienar Fleet Systems/Legends|Sienar Fleet Systems]] as a follow-up to the [[Guardian-class light cruiser|''Guardian''-class light cruiser]].

==Characteristics==
Slightly larger than its predecessor at 42 [[Meter/Legends|meters]], the ''Warden''-class was designed as a general security [[Starship/Legends|vessel]], capable of completing customs, patrol and engagement missions. It featured more powerful engines than the [[Guardian-class light cruiser|''Guardian''-class]], as well as improved [[Sensor/Legends|sensor]] capabilities. A crew of sixteen operated the vessel with one gunner manning a pair of turret-mounted [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]]. In addition, the interior could support fourteen troopers and 100 [[Metric ton/Legends|metric tons]] of cargo.<ref name="AJ4" />
